case_title: NORMAN A ARMSTRONG ET AL VS. 2600 - 18TH STREET HOMEOWNER'S ASSOCIATION

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,800.00 FILED BY ARMSTRONG, NORMAN A PSZONEK, GREGORY AS TO DEFENDANT 2600 - 18TH STREET HOMEOWNER'S ASSOCIATION ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-07-2019 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF ARMSTRONG, NORMAN A AS TO DEFENDANT 2600 - 18TH STREET HOMEOWNER'S ASSOCIATION
ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.
REMARK:FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 7/29/2022 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 681.53.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED NOV-09-2018, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT 2600 - 18TH STREET HOMEOWNER'S ASSOCIATION
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS. FILED BY DEFENDANT 2600 - 18TH STREET HOMEOWNER'S ASSOCIATION

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF NORMAN ARMSTRONG. NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF GREGORY PSZONEK. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT 2600 - 18TH ST HOMEOWNER'S ASSOCIATION REPRESENTED BY MONICA SHIRLEY, PRESIDENT OF HOA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
